extension.description: Network topology as code: draw physical and logical network diagrams (VRF, cables, circuits) for *.topo.json files — AI agents edit the same file as text and the canvas follows. NetBox-friendly naming, published JSON Schema, Markdown/draw.io export.
config.templatesFolder: Folder holding user templates (*.topo.json files) for the New Topology File command. Workspace-relative unless an absolute path or a full URI (e.g. vscode-vfs://… on virtual workspaces).
walkthrough.title: Get Started with TopoDraft
walkthrough.description: From install to your first living network diagram — humans and AI agents editing the same file.
walkthrough.openExample.title: Open an example topology
walkthrough.openExample.description:
See a live canvas in one click: a bundled example opens as an untitled document — nothing is saved to disk unless you decide to.
[Open Example](command:topodraft.openExample)
walkthrough.openExample.alt: The physical view of an example two-site topology on the TopoDraft canvas
walkthrough.draw.title: Draw your first change
walkthrough.draw.description: Drag node types from the left palette onto the canvas. Hover a node and drag from its ◦ port to connect; double-click to rename. Undo is plain Ctrl/Cmd+Z — every canvas action is just a text edit on the file.
walkthrough.draw.alt: Dragging a node from the palette and connecting nodes via a port
walkthrough.newFile.title: Create your own topology
walkthrough.newFile.description:
Start from a built-in template (two-site WAN, HSRP segment, routed LAG pair, …) — or from an empty file: a blank .topo.json opens as a scaffold, ready to draw on.
[New Topology File](command:topodraft.newFile)
walkthrough.newFile.alt: The logical view with VRF compartments and VRRP segments
walkthrough.agentGuide.title: Let your AI agent draw
walkthrough.agentGuide.description:
Write the file-format contract into AGENTS.md — coding agents pick it up automatically, edit the same JSON as text, and the canvas follows live.
[Write AI Agent Guide](command:topodraft.writeAgentGuide)
walkthrough.agentGuide.alt: An agent edits the JSON on the left and the canvas draws the topology on the right
walkthrough.validate.title: Validate anywhere
walkthrough.validate.description:
Semantic diagnostics land in the Problems panel with exact ranges and did-you-mean hints. In CI or for headless agents, the same checks run as `npx topodraft-cli validate`.
[Validate Current File](command:topodraft.validate)
walkthrough.validate.alt: A diagnostic with a did-you-mean suggestion and a passing check mark
config.pngExportScale: Rasterization scale for PNG export (1–4). 2 doubles the pixel dimensions for crisp embedding. Takes effect immediately, including already-open editors.
